user.title: Set up Somfy HA Gateway V3
user.description: Create the gateway. After setup, open Configure on this integration to add Somfy covers.

menu_option_descriptions.gateway_settings: Change the gateway name and TX/RX entities.
menu_option_descriptions.add_cover: Create a new Somfy cover device. The internal ID is generated automatically from the name.

add_cover.title: Add Somfy cover

data_description.address: Somfy RTS address. Use 1-6 hex characters, for example A1B2C1.
data_description.observed_addresses: Optional comma-separated addresses seen from remotes.
data_description.time_out: Full travel time down/out in seconds.
data_description.time_in: Full travel time up/in in seconds.

add_cover.description: Enter the cover details. The internal ID is generated automatically from the name and kept stable afterwards.

edit_cover.title: Edit Somfy cover
edit_cover.description: Edit {cover_name} ({cover_id}). The internal cover ID is kept stable.

advanced_json.title: Advanced JSON editor
advanced_json.description: Use this for bulk edits or recovery. Normal add/edit/remove flows are safer for daily use.

error.invalid_cover: The cover configuration is invalid. Check address format and required fields.
error.duplicate_cover_id: A cover with this generated ID already exists.

abort.no_covers: There are no covers to edit or remove.
abort.cover_not_found: The selected cover was not found.
